{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "87f43f65",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import warnings\n",
    "\n",
    "import geopandas as gpd\n",
    "import libpysal as lps\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "\n",
    "import esda"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "3993c125",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "gdf = gpd.read_file(\"data/berlin-neighbourhoods.geojson\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "4045601d",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "bl_df = pd.read_csv(\"data/berlin-listings.csv\")\n",
    "geometry = gpd.points_from_xy(x=bl_df.longitude, y=bl_df.latitude, crs='epsg:4326')\n",
    "bl_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(bl_df, geometry=geometry)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "32aafc31",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "neighbourhood_group\n",
       "Charlottenburg-Wilm.        58.556408\n",
       "Friedrichshain-Kreuzberg    55.492809\n",
       "Lichtenberg                 44.584270\n",
       "Marzahn - Hellersdorf       54.246754\n",
       "Mitte                       60.387890\n",
       "Neukölln                    45.135948\n",
       "Pankow                      60.282516\n",
       "Reinickendorf               43.682465\n",
       "Spandau                     48.236561\n",
       "Steglitz - Zehlendorf       54.445683\n",
       "Tempelhof - Schöneberg      53.704407\n",
       "Treptow - Köpenick          51.222004\n",
       "Name: price, dtype: float32"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 4,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "bl_gdf[\"price\"] = bl_gdf[\"price\"].astype(\"float32\")\n",
    "sj_gdf = gpd.sjoin(\n",
    "    gdf, bl_gdf, how=\"inner\", predicate=\"intersects\", lsuffix=\"left\", rsuffix=\"right\"\n",
    ")\n",
    "median_price_gb = sj_gdf[\"price\"].groupby([sj_gdf[\"neighbourhood_group\"]]).mean()\n",
    "median_price_gb"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "9c4be9d7",
   "metadata": {},

   ],
   "source": [
    "gdf = gdf.join(median_price_gb, on=\"neighbourhood_group\")\n",
    "gdf.rename(columns={\"price\": \"median_pri\"}, inplace=True)\n",
    "gdf.head(15)"
   ]
  },

   "id": "4f4c470f",

     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "np.int64(2)"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 6,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "pd.isnull(gdf[\"median_pri\"]).sum()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "f64a7c2c",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "gdf[\"median_pri\"] = gdf[\"median_pri\"].fillna(gdf[\"median_pri\"].mean())"
   ]
  },

   ],
   "source": [
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 10), subplot_kw={\"aspect\": \"equal\"})\n",
    "gdf.plot(column=\"median_pri\", scheme=\"Quantiles\", k=5, cmap=\"GnBu\", legend=True, ax=ax)\n",
    "# ax.set_xlim(150000, 160000)\n",
    "# ax.set_ylim(208000, 215000)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 10,
   "id": "61ca247b",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "df = gdf\n",
    "wq = lps.weights.Queen.from_dataframe(df, use_index=False, silence_warnings=True)\n",
    "wq.transform = \"r\""
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 11,
   "id": "6b0ceb50",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "y = df[\"median_pri\"]\n",
    "ylag = lps.weights.lag_spatial(wq, y)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 12,
   "id": "e09db19d",
   "metadata": {},

  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 13,
   "id": "19565980",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import mapclassify as mc\n",
    "\n",
    "ylagq5 = mc.Quantiles(ylag, k=5)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 14,
   "id": "822db335",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [

    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "f, ax = plt.subplots(1, figsize=(9, 9))\n",
    "df.assign(cl=ylagq5.yb).plot(\n",
    "    column=\"cl\",\n",
    "    categorical=True,\n",
    "    k=5,\n",
    "    cmap=\"GnBu\",\n",
    "    linewidth=0.1,\n",

    "    legend=True,\n",
    ")\n",

    "plt.title(\"Spatial Lag Median Price (Quintiles)\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 15,
   "id": "23c536a7",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",

       "<Figure size 864x400 with 2 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "df[\"lag_median_pri\"] = ylag\n",
    "f, ax = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(2.16 * 4, 4))\n",
    "df.plot(\n",
    "    column=\"median_pri\", ax=ax[0], edgecolor=\"k\", scheme=\"quantiles\", k=5, cmap=\"GnBu\"\n",
    ")\n",
    "ax[0].axis(df.total_bounds[np.asarray([0, 2, 1, 3])])\n",
    "ax[0].set_title(\"Price\")\n",
    "df.plot(\n",
    "    column=\"lag_median_pri\",\n",
    "    ax=ax[1],\n",
    "    edgecolor=\"k\",\n",
    "    scheme=\"quantiles\",\n",
    "    cmap=\"GnBu\",\n",
    "    k=5,\n",
    ")\n",
    "ax[1].axis(df.total_bounds[np.asarray([0, 2, 1, 3])])\n",
    "ax[1].set_title(\"Spatial Lag Price\")\n",
    "ax[0].axis(\"off\")\n",
    "ax[1].axis(\"off\")\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 16,
   "id": "d27da937",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "wq.transform = \"r\""
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 17,
   "id": "f7434938",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "np.float64(0.6563069331329718)"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 17,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "np.random.seed(12345)\n",
    "mi = esda.moran.Moran(y, wq)\n",
    "mi.I"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 18,
   "id": "a8252cc3",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "Text(0.5, 0, \"Moran's I\")"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 18,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import seaborn as sbn\n",
    "\n",
    "sbn.kdeplot(mi.sim, fill=True)\n",
    "plt.vlines(mi.I, 0, 1, color=\"r\")\n",
    "plt.vlines(mi.EI, 0, 1)\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Moran's I\")"
   ]
  },
  {
